user.title: EZVIZ Smart Lock
user.description:
Connect your EZVIZ Smart Lock to Home Assistant.

Security notice: Remote Unlock allows the door to be unlocked directly from Home Assistant. Enable this option only if you trust all Home Assistant administrators.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent by EZVIZ.

abort.already_configured: This lock has already been configured.
